title: armeria halleri subsp. muelleri
intro: Armeria halleri subsp. muelleri, also known as the Alpine Sea Thrift, is a plant species within the genus Armeria. This perennial plant is native to high-altitude alpine regions and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is used to promote respiratory health, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu, thanks to its expectorant properties and ability to soothe the throat and chest. Armeria halleri subsp. muelleri can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or decoction to take advantage of its health benefits.
